---
title: "Enclosure"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Physical housing, assembly, pipe, duct, conduit, or carrier resource for optical components or cables.

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `resource_id` | str | Stable identifier for this shareable inventory resource. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable enclosure name. |
| `enclosure_type` | str | Functional enclosure type, such as splice_box, junction_box, coupler, turnaround, patch_panel, protective_housing, conduit, pipe, duct, casing, borehole, or tray. |
| `owner` | str | Proprietary owner of the enclosure. |
| `material` | str | Enclosure material, such as steel, PVC, HDPE, concrete, or rock. |
| `manufacturer` | str | Manufacturer of the enclosure. |
| `model` | str | Model name of the enclosure. |
| `serial_number` | str | Manufacturer serial number for the enclosure. |
| `inner_diameter` | float \| None | Inner diameter in meters, when known. |
| `outer_diameter` | float \| None | Outer diameter in meters, when known. |
| `specification` | [ExternalResource](ExternalResource.qmd) \| None | External enclosure specification, datasheet, drawing, or product page. |
| `notes` | str | Additional notes. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [References](References.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

- contained by from [Cable](Cable.qmd)
- uses from [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)
- uses from [Connector](Connector.qmd)
- uses from [Splice](Splice.qmd)
- uses from [Terminator](Terminator.qmd)
